notes: Demotes source-blocked Leccinum and porcini/bolete records from normal edible-food routing to ID/caution or ID/comparison framing until stronger mushroom edible-use support is attached.

Keeps legitimate edible-with-caution or edible-with-preparation records edible when the record is food-valid; caution, prep, expert-ID, young-only, and reaction warnings remain additive badges/notes rather than route blockers.
Fixes Birch Bolete / Leccinum scabrum preparation alignment so thorough cooking is represented as required while keeping the record edible-with-caution.
Normalizes review-needed flags on selected avoid/comparison boletes whose edibility status already said review-required.
Marks Old Man of the Woods as edible-young-with-caution while preserving source-review debt for edible-use support.
